name: Bank of Commerce
description_short: Bank of Commerce is a traditional bank offering checking accounts, loan programs, and mobile banking through their BOC App with internet banking upgrades.
description_long: Bank of Commerce operates as a full-service bank accessible via their website at bankboc.com and physical locations. The institution appears to have a regional presence with an Oklahoma-based phone number (918 area code) and maintains FDIC relationships, indicating it operates under standard banking regulations. The company positions itself as a modern, customer-focused bank addressing the needs of busy consumers seeking accessible banking solutions. Bank of Commerce offers several core banking services including checking accounts with multiple product options, loan programs available through specialist consultation, mobile banking through their proprietary BOC App, internet banking services, and branch/ATM locator functionality. In December 2023, they deployed an upgraded internet banking platform designed to enhance user experience across both their mobile app and online banking channels. The bank emphasizes convenience and accessibility as core features of their service offering. The bank distinguishes itself through digital-first banking features, particularly their free BOC App which enables balance checking, fund transfers, check deposits, and location/ATM searches from smartphones. They advertise their internet banking upgrade as adding new functions to increase ease of use. The company has made a stated commitment to website accessibility and inclusion, using compliance tools to enhance user experience for all customers. Based on available website information, Bank of Commerce appears to be a legitimate, FDIC-related regional bank serving traditional banking needs. However, the website provides limited detailed information about specific account types, loan terms, interest rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond general statements about convenience and modern banking. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly at 918-628-5200 or csr@bankboc.com for detailed product specifications and pricing information.
services: Free BOC mobile app with balance checking
Mobile check deposit via BOC App
Fund transfers through mobile and online platforms
Internet banking (upgraded platform as of December 2023)
Customer support via phone (918-628-5200) and email (csr@bankboc.com)
Bank on the Go mobile banking marketed for busy lifestyles
pros: Free mobile BOC App with check deposit, transfers, and branch/ATM locating functionality
Recently upgraded internet banking platform launched December 2023 with enhanced user interface
FDIC-affiliated banking relationship indicating regulatory oversight and consumer protections
Multiple checking account options allowing customers to find products matching their needs
Direct specialist loan consultation available for loan program selection
Stated commitment to website accessibility and inclusion for all users
Local branch and ATM network accessible through mobile app locator
cons: Website provides no information about account fees, minimum balances, or interest rates
Limited transparency on loan programs—no APR ranges, terms, or eligibility criteria disclosed
No online account opening process described; requires direct contact with bank
Minimal information about competitive advantages or how offerings compare to other banks
Regional bank with Oklahoma phone number may limit accessibility for non-local customers
best_for: Customers in the Bank of Commerce service region seeking traditional banking with mobile app convenience
Busy professionals wanting smartphone-based checking and transfer capabilities
Borrowers who prefer in-person consultation with loan specialists
diagnosis: Bank of Commerce is best for regional customers seeking convenient, digital-forward banking with traditional bank stability and FDIC protections. The main caveat is limited online transparency regarding specific products, rates, and fees—customers must contact the bank directly for detailed information before opening accounts or applying for loans.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
